full_description: To-Do List is a simple and intuitive task management app. It allows users to create, prioritize, and track their tasks and projects. With a clean and minimalistic design, you can easily organize your tasks and focus on what needs to be done. Create new tasks, set reminders, and prioritize them based on importance. Track your progress and stay motivated to complete your tasks on time. Whether you're a student, professional, or anyone looking to get more organized, To-Do List is the perfect app for you.
